subtitle: Formal education and ongoing learning in AI and data.

items.title: Doctorate in DBA Applied AI (in progress)
items.text: Focused on applied AI, data science, and leadership in data‑driven organizations, complementing hands‑on data engineering work with advanced AI concepts.

items.title: Masters In Business Analytics
items.text: Focused on data analytics, statistical modeling, and business intelligence, with hands-on experience in data visualization, predictive analytics, and translating complex data into actionable business insights. Strengthened foundations in SQL, Python, and data-driven decision-making to complement data engineering expertise.
